name: Solana web3.js Backdoor (Private Key Stealer)
description: Compromised @solana/web3.js versions exfiltrate private keys and secret keys via obfuscated HTTP requests. $160K in crypto assets stolen.

affected_packages.name: @solana/web3.js
affected_packages.note: Attack window: Dec 2 2024 3:20PM - 8:25PM UTC. Targets private keys in Solana dapps and bots.

remediation: Rotate and regenerate ALL Solana private keys that were present on affected systems
Transfer assets to new wallets immediately
Audit transaction history for unauthorized transfers
Revoke any delegated authority from compromised wallets
